seoTitle: Parham vs Parilla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parham and Parilla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parham and Parilla.
heading: Parham vs Parilla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parham, South Australia and Parilla, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parilla has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Parham (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parham or Parilla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parham has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Parilla scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parham scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Parilla scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parham or Parilla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parilla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
